name: Tejas Shanthraj
title: Software Developer | Data Scientist
text:
Ashfaque was senior to Tejas but didn’t manage Tejas directly

Working under Ashfaque has been a transformative experience, and I couldn't have asked for a better mentor. As a backend developer on Ashfaque's team, I had the opportunity to work with him for 3+ years and 1+ organization. His guidance and vision were instrumental in shaping the projects. Ashfaque is exceptionally skilled at breaking down complex problems and guiding the team towards efficient, scalable solutions. He has an incredible ability to see the big picture while paying attention to the smallest details, which has been invaluable in our projects. He is an inspiring leader who brings out the best in his team, and I'm grateful for the chance to have worked with him. I highly recommend Ashfaque to any organization looking for a dynamic, visionary leader.
relation: Former Colleague at Byju's and Evergreen Community

name: Shashank V.
title: Lead SDE
text: Working with Ashfaque was one of the most valuable experiences in my career. His expertise in backend engineering, databases, and cloud architecture is exceptional. Beyond solving complex technical challenges, he has a remarkable ability to simplify difficult concepts and design scalable, reliable systems.What sets him apart is his leadership and willingness to mentor others. He consistently invested time in guiding me through technical challenges, encouraged me to think critically, and helped me grow as a backend engineer. His feedback was always practical, thoughtful, and focused on long-term improvement.He leads by example, stays calm under pressure, and makes well-informed technical decisions while keeping the team's growth in mind. On top of being an outstanding engineer and technology leader, he is a genuinely kind, approachable, and trustworthy person.I highly recommend him to any organization looking for a strong technical leader with deep expertise in backend systems, databases, cloud technologies, and team mentorship. Any team would be fortunate to work with him.
